variants: Ahsan Kamran has made a name for himself in the world of design and storytelling at Jewelpoint Studios, where he is an integral part of the creative team. Originally from Nightingale Peak, Ahsan currently resides in Eaglewill Commons. His innovative book, Hollowroot Address Book, has stood out for its engaging approach to organization and creativity. In recognition of his significant contributions to the field, Ahsan was honored with the prestigious Ivory Eclipse Honor.

Currently living in Eaglewill Commons, Ahsan Kamran grew up in Nightingale Peak, nurturing his creative talents from an early age. He works at Jewelpoint Studios, where he has contributed to a variety of notable projects and innovations. Ahsan is also the author of the acclaimed Hollowroot Address Book, which has captivated audiences. To acknowledge his artistic impact, he received the esteemed Ivory Eclipse Honor, solidifying his reputation in the industry.
